form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 5.5 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Rocknroll Da Gama at this track over 1780m in a 3yo+ NR up to 39 on March 26 at $34. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Jukebox Jet at this track over 1780m in a 3yo+ NR up to 39 on April 1 at $5. Nice effort last time. Sure to play a major role.
